languages.text: "Удивительная история, не находите?" {n}Себериан сжимает и разжимает скрипящую ладонь.{/n} "Меч пролежал бы в той гробнице многие тысячелетия, если бы я не отыскал его. Но я явился туда, и обратил наследие ксеносов к служению на благо Человечества. Ведь нашему виду, наследни{mf|к|ца}, уготовано править Галактикой и всем, что в ней есть. Всем без исключения".

"An astonishing story, do you not think?" {n}Seberian clenches and unclenches his creaking hand.{/n} "The sword would have lain in that tomb for many millennia had I not found it. But find it I did, and I turned the legacy of the xenos to the service of Humanity. For it is our species' destiny, heir of mine, to rule the galaxy and everything within it. Everything, without exception."
languages.original_text: "Удивительная история, не находите?" {n}Себериан сжимает и разжимает скрипящую ладонь.{/n} "Меч пролежал бы в той гробнице многие тысячелетия, если бы я не отыскал его. Но я явился туда, и обратил наследие ксеносов к служению на благо Человечества. Ведь нашему виду, наследни{mf|к|ца}, уготовано править Галактикой и всем, что в ней есть. Всем без исключения".

But I did, and turned the xenos legacy toward the service of Humanity. For it is our species' destiny, heir of mine, to rule the galaxy and everything within it. Everything, without exception."

"An astonishing story, do you not think?" {n}Seberian clenches and unclenches his creaking palm.{/n} "The sword lay in that tomb for many millennia until I found it. I named the blade 'Humanity's Right'. For it is our species' destiny, heir, to rule the Galaxy and everything within it. Everything, without exception."

"An astonishing story, do you not think?" {n}Seberian clenches and unclenches his creaking hand.{/n} "The sword would have lain in that tomb for many millennia had I not found it. But find it I did, and I turned the legacy of the xenos to the service of Humanity. For it is our species' destiny, heir of mine, to rule the galaxy and everything within it. Everything, without exception."

I named the blade 'Humanity's Right'. For it is our species' destiny, heir, to rule the Galaxy and everything within it. Everything, without exception."

But I did, and turned the xenos legacy toward the service of Humanity. For it is our species' destiny, heir of mine, to rule the galaxy and everything within it. Everything, without exception."

But find it I did, and I turned the legacy of the xenos to the service of Humanity. For it is our species' destiny, heir of mine, to rule the galaxy and everything within it. Everything, without exception."

languages.text: "Eine erstaunliche Geschichte, findet Ihr nicht?" {n}Seberian ballt seine Hand mehrmals knirschend zur Faust.{/n} "Das Schwert läge Tausende von Jahren in dieser Gruft, wenn ich es nicht gefunden hätte. Aber ich habe es gefunden und das Vermächtnis der Xenos in den Dienst der Menschheit gestellt. Denn es ist die Bestimmung unserer Spezies, {mf|werter Erbe|werte Erbin}, die Galaxie und alles darin zu beherrschen. Alles ohne Ausnahme."
languages.original_text: "An astonishing story, do you not think?" {n}Seberian clenches and unclenches his creaking hand.{/n} "The sword would have lain in that tomb for many millennia had I not found it. But find it I did, and I turned the legacy of the xenos to the service of Humanity. For it is our species' destiny, heir of mine, to rule the galaxy and everything within it. Everything, without exception."

traits.locale_text: "Eine erstaunliche Geschichte, findet Ihr nicht?" {n}Seberian ballt seine Hand mehrmals knirschend zur Faust.{/n} "Das Schwert läge Tausende von Jahren in dieser Gruft, wenn ich es nicht gefunden hätte. Aber ich habe es gefunden und das Vermächtnis der Xenos in den Dienst der Menschheit gestellt. Denn es ist die Bestimmung unserer Spezies, {mf|werter Erbe|werte Erbin}, die Galaxie und alles darin zu beherrschen. Alles ohne Ausnahme."

languages.text: « Une fascinante histoire, vous ne trouvez pas ? » {n}Seberian serre et desserre le poing dans un bruit grinçant.{/n} « Sans mon intervention, cette lame aurait passé des millénaires dans ce tombeau. Mais je l'ai trouvée, et j'ai fait de cette relique xénos un instrument au service de l'humanité. Car le destin de notre espèce, mon {mf|héritier|héritière}, est de régner sur la galaxie et sur tout ce qu'elle renferme. Tout, sans exception. »
languages.original_text: "An astonishing story, do you not think?" {n}Seberian clenches and unclenches his creaking hand.{/n} "The sword would have lain in that tomb for many millennia had I not found it. But find it I did, and I turned the legacy of the xenos to the service of Humanity. For it is our species' destiny, heir of mine, to rule the galaxy and everything within it. Everything, without exception."

traits.locale_text: « Une fascinante histoire, vous ne trouvez pas ? » {n}Seberian serre et desserre le poing dans un bruit grinçant.{/n} « Sans mon intervention, cette lame aurait passé des millénaires dans ce tombeau. Mais je l'ai trouvée, et j'ai fait de cette relique xénos un instrument au service de l'humanité. Car le destin de notre espèce, mon {mf|héritier|héritière}, est de régner sur la galaxie et sur tout ce qu'elle renferme. Tout, sans exception. »

languages.text: «Es una historia asombrosa, ¿no cree?». {n}Seberian aprieta y afloja su chirriante mano.{/n} «La espada habría pasado milenios en esa tumba si no la hubiese encontrado. Pero la encontré, destinando el legado de los xenos al servicio de la Humanidad. Pues es el destino de nuestra especie gobernar la galaxia y todo lo que contiene, hereder{mf|o|a} mí{mf|o|a}. Sin excepciones».
languages.original_text: "An astonishing story, do you not think?" {n}Seberian clenches and unclenches his creaking hand.{/n} "The sword would have lain in that tomb for many millennia had I not found it. But find it I did, and I turned the legacy of the xenos to the service of Humanity. For it is our species' destiny, heir of mine, to rule the galaxy and everything within it. Everything, without exception."

Pero la encontré, destinando el legado de los xenos al servicio de la Humanidad. Pues es el destino de nuestra especie gobernar la galaxia y todo lo que contiene, hereder{mf|o|a} mí{mf|o|a}. Sin excepciones».

languages.text: "Şaşırtıcı bir hikâye, sence de öyle değil mi?" {n}Seberian, gıcırdayan elini sıkıp açıyor.{/n} "Onu bulmasam bu kılıç binlerce yıl o mezarda yatacaktı. Fakat onu buldum ve zenoların mirasını İnsanlığın hizmetine sundum. Zira türümüzün kaderi, Galaksi'ye ve içindeki her şeye hükmetmektir vârisim. İstisnasız her şeye."
languages.original_text: "An astonishing story, do you not think?" {n}Seberian clenches and unclenches his creaking hand.{/n} "The sword would have lain in that tomb for many millennia had I not found it. But find it I did, and I turned the legacy of the xenos to the service of Humanity. For it is our species' destiny, heir of mine, to rule the galaxy and everything within it. Everything, without exception."

traits.locale_text: "Şaşırtıcı bir hikâye, sence de öyle değil mi?" {n}Seberian, gıcırdayan elini sıkıp açıyor.{/n} "Onu bulmasam bu kılıç binlerce yıl o mezarda yatacaktı. Fakat onu buldum ve zenoların mirasını İnsanlığın hizmetine sundum. Zira türümüzün kaderi, Galaksi'ye ve içindeki her şeye hükmetmektir vârisim. İstisnasız her şeye."

languages.text: “真是个惊人的故事，你不觉得吗？”{n}塞贝里安反复握紧又松开他那只吱嘎作响的手。{/n}“若非我找到了它，这把剑还会在那座墓穴里沉睡数万年。但我确实找到了，并让异形的遗产为人类的事业所用。因为这是我们种族的宿命，继承人。统治银河，以及其中的一切。所有的一切，无一例外。”
languages.original_text: "An astonishing story, do you not think?" {n}Seberian clenches and unclenches his creaking hand.{/n} "The sword would have lain in that tomb for many millennia had I not found it. But find it I did, and I turned the legacy of the xenos to the service of Humanity. For it is our species' destiny, heir of mine, to rule the galaxy and everything within it. Everything, without exception."

traits.locale_text: “真是个惊人的故事，你不觉得吗？”{n}塞贝里安反复握紧又松开他那只吱嘎作响的手。{/n}“若非我找到了它，这把剑还会在那座墓穴里沉睡数万年。但我确实找到了，并让异形的遗产为人类的事业所用。因为这是我们种族的宿命，继承人。统治银河，以及其中的一切。所有的一切，无一例外。”

languages.text: 「驚くべき話ですね」{n}シベリアは手首をこすって、老いた手首を鳴らした。{/n}「もし私がその剣を見つけていなかったら、その剣は千年も、いや何千年も、その墓に眠っていたでしょう。しかし私はそれを発見し、その剣を人類のために使いました。なぜなら、私の後継者である人類の運命は、銀河と銀河の中にある全てを支配することなのです。全て、例外なく。」
languages.original_text: "An astonishing story, do you not think?" {n}Seberian clenches and unclenches his creaking hand.{/n} "The sword would have lain in that tomb for many millennia had I not found it. But find it I did, and I turned the legacy of the xenos to the service of Humanity. For it is our species' destiny, heir of mine, to rule the galaxy and everything within it. Everything, without exception."
